Text: Stop writing meeting notes like a novelist. Your report only needs: decisions made, blockers identified, next steps assigned. Most PMs spend 3-4 hours/week on formatting. Reportify AI does it in 30 seconds. Raw notes → executive-ready Word docs + PPT. Try it: https://goreportify.com/generate.html
